---
title: R
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

#### use a spinner while waiting for a function to run

```r
wait = function(){
  Sys.sleep(5)
  "hello"
}
callr::r(wait, spinner = TRUE)
```
